---
title: Slides
---

## Course Slides

Click on a topic to download the PDF slide deck.

| # | Module | |
|--:|--------|:-:|
| 0 | [Course Introduction](slides/00-intro.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/00-intro.pdf) |
| 1 | [AI Fundamentals](slides/m1-ai-in-finance.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m1-ai-in-finance.pdf) |
| 2 | [Getting Started with Claude Code](slides/m3-claude.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m3-claude.pdf) |
| 3a | [Portfolio Optimization](slides/m2-mean-variance.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m2-mean-variance.pdf) |
| 3b | [Company Valuation](slides/m4-dcf.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m4-dcf.pdf) |
| 4 | [AI Agents](slides/m6-agents.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m6-agents.pdf) |
| 5 | [Building Financial AI Applications](slides/m7-apps.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m7-apps.pdf) |
| 6 | [Connecting AI to Data and Tools](slides/m8-mcp.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m8-mcp.pdf) |
| 7 | [Verification and Governance](slides/m5-reliability.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m5-reliability.pdf) |
| 8 | [Working with Financial Documents](slides/m9-rag.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m9-rag.pdf) |
| 9 | [AI in Trading and Markets](slides/m10-sentiment.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m10-sentiment.pdf) |
